Risk_Description: User comments may contain personal information
Mitigation_Action: Remove personal information from comments and use anonymous Test User IDs

Risk_Description: Unauthorized users may access prototype features
Mitigation_Action: Use login authentication and restrict admin functions

Risk_Description: Images or icons may be used without proper license
Mitigation_Action: Use royalty-free assets and record sources

Risk_Description: Users may misunderstand the prototype as a production system
Mitigation_Action: Clearly label the system as an academic prototype

Risk_Description: Incomplete feedback may reduce validation accuracy
Collected usability data could be shared without authorization
Mitigation_Action: Store files securely and limit access to project members and instructor
